creator: sobomax@FreeBSD.org
text:
Hi,

With this message I'm attaching patch against your version of the port. This
patch includes several cleanups:
- all programs and man pages now being suffixed with "3" to avoid conflict
between old popper and new installed on the same machine;
- README.html removed, since this file is not for repository and being
generated within release preparation procedures;
- files/sendto.c removed since it is not used during port build (please verify
validity of this);
- WWW line added into pkg/DESCR;
- spaces replaced with tabs in Makefile.

Please review all points above and let me know your opinion.

Today I would ask CVS meisters to make repo copy of the older mail/popper port
into mail/popper3 and after that would be ready to import it.

-Maxim
